name: United Kingdom
description: ~30 rules covering ~90% of typical UK household transactions. Includes the 'big four' supermarkets, discounters, high-street retailers, and major utility/telecom providers.

rules.name: Groceries — major chains
rules.pattern: (?i)\btesco\b|sainsbury|\basda\b|morrisons|waitrose|\bocado\b|\baldi\b|\blidl\b|\bspar\b|\bcoop\b|the co-?op|m&s food|marks ?& ?spencer|iceland foods|booths|budgens|nisa\b|londis|costcutter

rules.name: Coffee shops
rules.pattern: (?i)costa coffee|\bcosta\b|starbucks|\bcaffè nero\b|caffe nero|pret a manger|\bpret\b|\bgreggs\b|leon\b|black sheep coffee|\bcoffee\b|\bcafe\b|\bespresso\b

rules.name: Fast food & casual dining
rules.pattern: (?i)mcdonald|burger king|\bkfc\b|\bsubway\b|domino|pizza hut|papa john|\bnando'?s\b|wagamama|\bgbk\b|gourmet burger|five guys|leon\b|wasabi|itsu\b|yo ?sushi|wagamama|pizza express|\bpret\b|byron|hard rock cafe|\bzizzi\b|\bask italian\b|\bprezzo\b|cote brasserie|the ivy

rules.name: Food delivery
rules.pattern: (?i)deliveroo|uber ?eats|just ?eat|\bgousto\b|hello ?fresh|gorillas\b|\bgetir\b|\bzapp\b

rules.name: Pubs & off-licences
rules.pattern: (?i)\bpub\b|\btavern\b|\barms\b inn|wetherspoon|young'?s|fuller'?s|greene king|\bmitchell'?s & butler\b|m & b\b|brewing\b|brewery|\boddbins\b|majestic wine|\bbottle shop\b|\boff licence\b|nicolas wine

rules.name: Fuel stations
rules.pattern: (?i)\bbp\b|\bshell\b|\besso\b|\btexaco\b|jet petrol|\bgulf\b petrol|sainsbury'?s petrol|tesco petrol|asda petrol|morrisons petrol|applegreen|euro garages|\beg group\b|\bmotor fuel\b

rules.name: Public transit & rail
rules.pattern: (?i)\btfl\b|transport for london|\boyster\b|london underground|\bnational rail\b|\btrainline\b|\bgwr\b|\blner\b|\bsoutheastern\b|south western|northern rail|\bmerseyrail\b|tyne ?and ?wear|stagecoach|first bus|arriva\b|\bnxbus\b|national express|megabus

rules.name: Rideshare & taxi
rules.pattern: (?i)\buber\b(?!.?eats)|\bbolt\b ride|\bgett\b|\bola\b cabs|free ?now|\btaxi\b|\bminicab\b|\bblack cab\b

rules.name: Parking
rules.pattern: (?i)\bringo\b|paybyphone|\bjustpark\b|\bncp\b|q-?park|saba ?park|apcoa parking|car park\b

rules.name: Airlines
rules.pattern: (?i)british airways|\bba\.com\b|easyjet|ryanair|jet2\b|virgin atlantic|wizz air|tui airways|loganair|\baer lingus\b

rules.name: Hotels
rules.pattern: (?i)premier inn|travelodge|hilton|marriott|hyatt|holiday inn|\bibis\b|\bnovotel\b|mercure\b|premier travel|\bjurys inn\b|leonardo hotels|best western|hotel\b|\bb&b\b|bed and breakfast

rules.name: Travel booking
rules.pattern: (?i)airbnb|\bvrbo\b|booking\.com|expedia|hotels\.com|trivago|skyscanner|on the beach|jet2 holidays|\btui\b|\bthomas cook\b

rules.name: Streaming services

rules.name: Software & cloud

rules.name: Utilities (electric/gas/water)

rules.pattern: (?i)\boverdraft\b fee|monthly fee|service charge|non-?sterling fee|foreign transaction|atm fee|wire fee|annual fee

rules.name: Auto / home insurance
rules.pattern: (?i)admiral insurance|aviva\b|direct line|\baxa\b|hastings direct|\blv=\b|liverpool victoria|churchill insurance|esure|\bsaga\b insurance|more than|\brias\b|\bnfu mutual\b|sheilas wheels

rules.name: Council tax & gov
rules.pattern: (?i)council tax|hmrc\b|gov\.uk|\bdvla\b|tv licence|tv licensing|passport office|home office
